title: odbcad32.exe
html:
odbcad32.exe

ODBC Data Source Administrator to manage User/System DSNs and ODBC drivers.

UAC Bypass

Execute a binary as a high-integrity process without a UAC prompt.

odbcad32.exe

Launch odbcad32.exe GUI, click 'Tracing' tab, click 'Browsing' button, enter abitrary command in the File Dialog's path, press enter. — MITRE: T1548.002 — Privileges: User
